title: Magica Futurca
description: Do you like magic, tech, or just like modded in general well here you go
body:
This is a modpack that has magic, tech, optimization, and QoL mods. It's hours of fun for single to multiplayer, and content creators for the use of replay mod. So I hope all of you have all the fun while playing.

Main key mods:
Bewitchment- fun magic mod for single and multiplayer
Applied Energistics 2 (AE2)- a wonderful storage mod that will free space in your base/home
Gravestone and journeymap- don't you hate it when you've adventured far out in the world and a creeper blew up and now you have to trek all the way back well don't worry with journey map you'll have a waypoint to show where you died and gravestones to save your stuff
Icarus- Tired of constantly making rockets to fly, well you can upgrade the elytra so you can fly with out needing the rockets

For Multiplayer server:
Simple Voice Chat- a proximity chat that is good for casual gaming all the way for roleplaying servers
MyLoot- so that everyone has a chance for loot

QoL Mods:
Waystones- to be able to teleport to spots you've been to
Elytra slot- don't you hate having to constantly switch between chestplate and elytra I know I do
Botany Pots and Trees- allows you to grow crops and trees without deforesting the area around you
Chunk loaders- for when your out and about you dont need to worry about losing out on crop growth
ForgivingVoid- are you always scared in the end, well no worrying now you will pop back up

Optimization:
Chunky- Pregenerates chunks
Dynamic FPS- reduces speed of rendering
ServerCore- improves preformance and reduces lag spikes

For Content Creators: 
Replay mod- allows you to record your game session and saves the footage
